zh.lifeSummary: Thomas Doggett是Robert Doggett和Dennice A Parke的兒子，於1572年1月18日出生。他於1595年9月21日與Isabell Martin在英國英格蘭肯特古度爾斯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1621年7月6日在英國英格蘭肯特霍斯蒙登享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Thomas Doggett是Robert Doggett和Dennice A Parke的儿子，于1572年1月18日出生。他于1595年9月21日与Isabell Martin在英国英格兰肯特古度爾斯特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1621年7月6日在英国英格兰肯特霍斯蒙登享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Doggett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Duckett with voicing of the medial consonant. Alternatively, the name may also be from a Middle English rhyming pet form of Roger (see Dodge ) + the diminutive suffix -et. But whether the medial -g- was pronounced as a stop /g/ (as in dog) or an affricate /dʒ/ (as in Roger) is impossible to tell.

variants.name: Duckett
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): from the Middle English personal name Duket. This may sometimes have been an early Middle English pet form of an Old English Ducc(a), but was more often a pet form of Marmaduke, especially in Yorkshire (see Duke ). Marmaduke itself is from Irish Maol Maedóc ‘servant of Maedóc’, Maedóc being the name of prominent Irish saints of the 6th and 7th centuries.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: Thomas Doggett was born on 18 January 1572 as the son of Robert Doggett and Dennice A Parke. He married Isabell Martin on 21 September 1595, in Goudhurst, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 6 July 1621, in Horsmonden, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Thomas Doggett est né le 18 janvier 1572, fils de Robert Doggett et Dennice A Parke. Il a épousé Isabell Martin le 21 septembre 1595, à Goudhurst, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 6 juillet 1621, à Horsmonden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Thomas Doggett wurde am 18. Januar 1572, als Sohn von Robert Doggett und Dennice A Parke geboren. Er hat am 21. September 1595 in Goudhurst, Kent, England, United Kingdom Isabell Martin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 6. Juli 1621 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Horsmonden, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Thomas Doggett è nato il il 18 gennaio 1572 come figlio di Robert Doggett e Dennice A Parke. Lui sposato Isabell Martin il 21 settembre 1595, nel Goudhurst, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 6 luglio 1621, nel Horsmonden, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Doggettは1572年1月18日にRobert DoggettとDennice A Parkeの息子として生まれた。1595年9月21日にイギリスイギリスケントゴウドハルストでIsabell Martinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1621年7月6日にイギリスイギリスケントホールスモンデンで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Doggett(은)는 1572년 1월 18일 Robert Doggett(와)과 Dennice A Parke의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1595년 9월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 고우드후르스트에서 Isabell Martin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1621년 7월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 호르스몽에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.18 Jan 1572–06 Jul 1621: 18 de janeiro de 1572–6 de julho de 1621
pt.lifeSummary: Thomas Doggett nasceu em 18 de janeiro de 1572 filho de Robert Doggett e Dennice A Parke. Ele casou-se com Isabell Martin em 21 de setembro de 1595, em Goudhurst, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de julho de 1621, em Horsmonden, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Thomas Doggett родился 18 января 1572 г. Его родителей звали Robert Doggett и Dennice A Parke. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabell Martin 21 сентября 1595 г. в местности гоудхурст, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 6 июля 1621 г. в местности хаурсмонден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет.

es.18 Jan 1572–06 Jul 1621: 18 de enero de 1572–6 de julio de 1621
es.lifeSummary: Thomas Doggett nació el 18 de enero de 1572 como hijo de Robert Doggett y Dennice A Parke. Se casó con Isabell Martin el 21 de septiembre de 1595, en Goudhurst, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 6 de julio de 1621, en Horsmonden, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 49 años.
